prediction.title: Disease Prediction Portal
prediction.subtitle: Early detection is the first step toward a healthier life. Select a category to begin your assessment.

kidney.name: Kidney Disease
kidney.intro: Kidney disease occurs when the kidneys lose their ability to filter waste from the blood. Early detection is vital.

liver.name: Liver Disease
liver.intro: Includes conditions that impair liver functions such as detoxification, protein synthesis, and digestion support.

diabetes.name: Diabetes
diabetes.intro: A chronic condition that affects how your body regulates blood sugar. Managing levels is critical to prevent complications.

chat.welcome_message: Diagnostic system active. State your symptoms for analysis.
chat.prediction_prefix: Analysis suggests a high probability of:

hero.subtitle: Advanced predictive intelligence for metabolic, renal, and hepatic health. Understand your body with clinical-grade clarity.

synthesis.title: Multi-System Intelligence.
synthesis.description: Our specialized engine securely cross-references Kidney, Liver, and Diabetes markers to map your holistic vitality trends and long-term risk profile.

companion.title: AI Health Companion
companion.description: Context-aware diet protocols, exercise routines, and immediate clinical guidance right in your dashboard.
companion.prompt_example: How can I optimize fiber intake for my glucose levels today?

charts.title: Visual Analytics
charts.description: Dynamic, interactive charts that transform your medical history into clear, actionable progress.

reports.title: Smart Clinical Reports
reports.description: Generate comprehensive PDF summaries from your AI predictions, perfectly formatted for your next doctor's visit.

emergency.title: Emergency Hub
emergency.description: Immediate access to critical support protocols and medical information upon high-risk detection.

final_cta.title: Take control of your vitals.
final_cta.description: Join a proactive network using advanced intelligence to monitor health trends and live informed.
